directives.focus: Produce artifacts that increase visible pilot value and reduce Alfredo manual work
directives.desired_outcome: Local code, tests, cockpit fixtures, decision queues, or monitors — not more reports
forbidden_interpretations: This directive does NOT authorize R1 operations
This directive does NOT bypass Dispatcher
This directive does NOT allow Supabase/DB writes
This directive does NOT mean skip grounding
This directive does NOT mean ignore Memory Palace
directives.t1_verbatim: Priorizar artefactos que aumenten valor visible del piloto y reduzcan trabajo manual de Alfredo. No producir más reportes si puede producir código local, test, cockpit fixture, decision queue o monitor útil. Mantener R0+, no R1.

directives.focus: Priorizar robustez del sistema vivo sobre novedad. Si hay conflicto entre crear artefacto nuevo y reducir riesgo de provider drift, priorizar reducción de riesgo.
directives.desired_outcome: Provider migration guard, conflict resolution, risk reduction code — stability over novelty

This directive does NOT bypass Dispatcher
This directive does NOT allow provider auto-replacement
This directive does NOT allow Supabase/DB writes
This directive does NOT mean skip grounding
This directive does NOT mean ignore Memory Palace
